sections.paragraph: const. נֵכַר Deu 31:16, something strange-(a) a strange or foreign country. Hence בֶּן־נֵכָר, pl. בְּנֵי נֵכָר a stranger, strangers, Gen 17:12, 27 Gen 17:27 Exo 12:43 sometimes with the additional notion of hostility, Psa 18:45, 46 Psa 18:46. אֱלֹהֵי הַנֵּכָר strange gods, Gen 35:2 Jer 5:19.-(b) a strange or unknown thing, specially used of a strange god, Neh 13:30 2Ch 14:2.
